metadata.description: Name of the boot diagnostics storage account, this is where serial log files are stored.
Password for the Virtual Machine.
Name of the page blob storage account.
Key of the page blob storage account.
IP address of the page blob storage account.
Name of the PLRS storage account where VM root volume pageblobs will reside.
Size of the VM.
Resource Id of the Subnet to use with this ONTAP Cloud instance
Resource Id of the Network Security Group to use for this ONTAP Cloud instance
Base Name for the Virtual Machines in the Resource Group.
Platform Serial Number to use on Node 1.
Platform Serial Number to use on Node 2.
The gateway IP address for the vnet's subnet.
The network mask for the subnet, e.g. 255.255.254.0.
Enable Accelerated Networking.
The size of the coredisk in GB, minimum of 1024GB allowed.
Azure Marketplace Offer for the ONTAP Cloud image to deploy.
Azure Marketplace SKU for the ONTAP Cloud image to deploy.
Azure Marketplace Version for the ONTAP Cloud image to deploy.
Blob url for diagnostics, different for various clouds, e.g. AzureGov.
Enable HTTPS or HTTP protocol in the Storage Account.
Vhd source if not deploying from the marketplace
Shared Image Gallery containing CVO Images
Image Definition
Image Version
Subscription ID containing SIG, defaulted to a dummy string to pass template validation
Resource Group hosting SIG
CVO Image Source
Zone for VM1
Zone for VM2
Shared HA type in Azure
Allows for use of customer managed keys on system and data disks
Media used for NVlogs or Journaling
Disk size for NVRAM Premium SSD v2 disk
IOPS for NVRAM Premium SSD v2 disk
MBps for NVRAM Premium SSD v2 disk
Use V1 or V2 as hyperV Generation.
Use NVMe or SCSI as Disk Controller Type.
Region in which this solution is deployed.
Admin username

When set to true (Zone-Redundant), frontend's IP address is served simultaneously by multiple independent infrastructure deployments in multiple availability zones (Zone 1,2,3); when set to false (Non-Zonal), this option does not give a guarantee of redundancy
When set, NFS outages for unplanned events will be shorter. The Azure feature enableHighAvailability must be registered on the subscription.
Size of the data disks in GB
Address prefix of subnet selected.
Either create a new VNET or use existing.
VNET name if creating new.
VNET Address prefixes if creating new.
Subnet Name if creating new.

osProfile.customData:
[base64(concat('vm_name=vm1', '
', 'deployment_type=shared_ha', '
', 'shared_ha_type=', parameters('sharedHaType'), '
', 'ontap_cloud_platform_serial_number=', parameters('vm1PlatformSerialNumber'), '
', 'subnet_mask=', parameters('subnetMask'), '
', 'subnet_gateway_ip=', parameters('subnetGatewayIp'), '
', 'mgmt_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'mgmt_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'cluster_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic1')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'cluster_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic1')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'ic_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic2')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'ic_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic2')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'pageblob_local_ip=', if(equals(parameters('sharedHaType'),'pageblob'), reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic3')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ''), '
', 'pageblob_partner_ip=', if(equals(parameters('sharedHaType'),'pageblob'), reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic3')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ''), '
', 'pageblob_container=', variables('pageblobContainerName'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_name=', parameters('pageblobStorageAccountName'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_key=', variables('pageblobStorageAccountKeyMod'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_fqdn=', variables('pageblobStorageAccountFQDN'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_ip=', parameters('pageblobStorageAccountIp'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_port=', variables('pageblobSAPort'), '
', 'nvlog_media_type=', parameters('nvLogMediaType'), '
', 'cluster_mgmt_ip=', reference(variables('loadBalancerID'), '2018-04-01').frontendIPConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'intercluster_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[1].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'subnet_address_prefix=', parameters('subnetAddressPrefix'), '
', 'dataA_fip=', reference(variables('loadBalancerID'), '2018-04-01').frontendIPConfigurations[1].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'dataB_fip=', reference(variables('loadBalancerID'), '2018-04-01').frontendIPConfigurations[2].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'iscsi_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[2].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'iscsi_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[2].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'data_svm_fip=', reference(variables('loadBalancerID'), '2018-04-01').frontendIPConfigurations[3].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'cvo_self_setup=true', '
', 'admin_password=', parameters('adminPassword'), '
', 'user_bootargs=', parameters('userBootargs'), '
'))]

[base64(concat('vm_name=vm2', '
', 'deployment_type=shared_ha', '
', 'shared_ha_type=', parameters('sharedHaType'), '
', 'ontap_cloud_platform_serial_number=', parameters('vm2PlatformSerialNumber'), '
', 'subnet_mask=', parameters('subnetMask'), '
', 'subnet_gateway_ip=', parameters('subnetGatewayIp'), '
', 'mgmt_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'mgmt_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'cluster_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic1')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'cluster_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic1')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'ic_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic2')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'ic_partner_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic2')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'pageblob_local_ip=', if(equals(parameters('sharedHaType'),'pageblob'), reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic3')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ''), '
', 'pageblob_partner_ip=', if(equals(parameters('sharedHaType'),'pageblob'), reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic3')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, ''), '
', 'pageblob_container=', variables('pageblobContainerName'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_name=', parameters('pageblobStorageAccountName'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_key=', variables('pageblobStorageAccountKeyMod'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_fqdn=', variables('pageblobStorageAccountFQDN'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_ip=', parameters('pageblobStorageAccountIp'), '
', 'pageblob_sa_port=', variables('pageblobSAPort'), '
', 'nvlog_media_type=', parameters('nvLogMediaType'), '
', 'vm1_cluster_ip', reference(concat(variables('vm1Name'),'-nic1')).ipConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'cluster_mgmt_ip=', reference(variables('loadBalancerID'), '2018-04-01').frontendIPConfigurations[0].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'intercluster_local_ip=', reference(concat(variables('vm2Name'),'-nic0')).ipConfigurations[1].properties.privateIPAddress, '
', 'subnet_address_prefix=', parameters('subnetAddressPrefix'), '
', 'cvo_self_setup=true', '
', 'admin_password=', parameters('adminPassword'), '
', 'user_bootargs=', parameters('userBootargs'), '
'))]
